home.title: Learn anything with AI tutoring
home.subtitle: Get a personalized 3-stage learning path, adaptive practice, and real-time feedback — all powered by AI.
home.trust_note: Free to start · No credit card required
home.features_subtitle: Built around a tight 3-stage loop that turns knowledge into capability.
home.feature_1_desc: Tell us your goal. We generate a learning path tuned to your current level.
home.feature_2_desc: Difficulty adjusts to your mastery in real time. No busywork, no frustration.
home.feature_3_desc: Learn from peers, share knowledge in the community knowledge base.
home.how_subtitle: Three stages, one loop. Move from concept to capability in days, not months.
home.step_1_desc: Type what you want to learn in plain language. We turn it into a structured plan.
home.step_2_desc: Socratic conversations and adaptive tasks build real understanding.
home.step_3_title: Prove it on a real task
home.step_3_desc: Submit work, get AI-scored against a rubric, iterate until you pass.
home.cta_subtitle: Start a plan in under a minute. No setup, no commitment.
home.footer_tagline: Learn with AI, prove with work.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your personalized learning journey in seconds.
signup.name: Name

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_plans_yet: You don't have any learning plans yet. Create your first one to get started.

plans.title: My Learning Plans
plans.list_empty: No learning plans yet. Click "New plan" to create your first one.
plans.skeleton_placeholder: Plans will appear here once the AI orchestrator is wired in Week 2.

intake.title: What do you want to learn?
intake.subtitle: Describe your goal and we'll generate a personalized 3-stage learning path.
intake.goal_placeholder: e.g. Master React, learn Spanish to B2, pass the AWS Solutions Architect exam...
intake.budget_exceeded: Daily AI budget exceeded. Please try again tomorrow.

learn.title: Learn
learn.empty_hint: Ask me anything about "{title}" — I'll explain, give examples, and check understanding.
learn.mark_complete_confirm: Mark this node as learned? You can revisit any time.

practice.title: Practice
practice.empty_hint: Ready to apply what you learned about "{title}"? Tell me when you'd like a practice task.
practice.input_placeholder: Ask for a task, or paste your attempt for feedback...

assess.title: Assess
assess.submission_placeholder: Paste or write your work here...
assess.error_empty: Please enter a submission before grading.
assess.error_budget: Daily AI budget exceeded. Please try again tomorrow.

errors.no_plan_id: Server didn't return a plan ID. Please try again.
errors.fatal_desc: We hit an unexpected error. Please try again, and reach out if it keeps happening.
errors.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
